title: Deep Learning Approaches for Protein Structure Prediction: A Comprehensive Review
summary: This paper presents a comprehensive analysis of recent deep learning methodologies.

title: Quantum Computing Applications in Drug Discovery: Current State and Future Prospects
summary: An extensive review of quantum computing methodologies being applied to accelerate drug discovery.

title: CRISPR–Cas9 Gene Editing: Recent Advances in Therapeutic Applications
summary: This review summarizes the latest developments in CRISPR–Cas9 technology for therapeutic use.

title: Machine Learning for Medical Imaging: Opportunities and Challenges
summary: An overview of how machine learning is transforming diagnostic imaging and healthcare analytics.

title: Ethical Considerations in AI-driven Healthcare Systems
summary: Discusses fairness, transparency, and accountability in AI adoption for clinical decision-making.

title: Neural Interfaces: Bridging Brain and Machine Communication
summary: Explores the latest advancements in neural interface technology enabling brain-computer interaction.

title: Blockchain for Secure Patient Data Management
summary: Evaluates blockchain solutions for enhancing privacy, interoperability, and traceability in healthcare.

author.name: Hoo Lee Sheet, Hung Le, Cao Ly Ma

title: Synthetic Biology in Pharmaceutical Development
summary: Summarizes the integration of synthetic biology tools in the creation of novel drug candidates.

title: Automated Literature Mining for Biomedical Insights
summary: Introduces an NLP-driven approach to extract key findings from biomedical literature efficiently.

title: Nanorobotics in Targeted Cancer Therapy: A New Frontier
summary: Describes emerging nanorobotic systems engineered for precision drug delivery to cancerous cells.
